mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly negative when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate exceeding 4.0 percent signals labor market deterioration and reduced household consumption, causing immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60 percent of instances when UNRATE crosses above 4.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a Rank IC above 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects supply-side contraction and reduced corporate output, leading to negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines do not correlate with negative 5-day returns during periods of rising FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index growth above 3.0 percent forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL values above 3.0 consistently precede positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls indicate expanding economic activity and higher corporate revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to predict positive 60-day returns with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: When monthly retail sales growth outpaces quarterly GDP growth, consumer-driven sectors rally and lift the broader index, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Retail sales outperformance relative to GDPC1 does not yield positive 20-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production below negative 0.5 percent signals immediate manufacturing contraction, triggering negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines below negative 0.5 percent fail to predict negative 5-day returns.
